zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Grey於1266年8月18日出生在英國諾圖波藍德希頓時，他的父親Robert de Grey20歲，母親Joan de Valoines18歲。他於大約1280年與Mrs Thomas Grey結婚。他於1297年登記服兵役。他去世於1310年7月28日在英國蘇格蘭安格斯福爾法爾享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Grey于1266年8月18日出生在英国諾圖波藍德希頓时，他的父亲Robert de Grey20岁，母亲Joan de Valoines18岁。他于大约1280年与Mrs Thomas Grey结婚。他于1297年登记服兵役。他去世于1310年7月28日在英国苏格兰安格斯福爾法爾享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Grey was born on 18 August 1266, in Heaton, Northumberland, England, his father, Robert de Grey, was 20 and his mother, Joan de Valoines, was 18. He married Mrs Thomas Grey about 1280. He registered for military service in 1297. He died on 28 July 1310, in Forfar, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Grey est né le 18 août 1266, à Heaton, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Grey, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joan de Valoines, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Thomas Grey environ 1280. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1297. Il est décédé le 28 juillet 1310, à Forfar, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Grey am 18. August 1266 in Heaton, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Grey 20 und seine Mutter Joan de Valoines 18. Er hat um 1280 Mrs Thomas Grey geheiratet. Er hat sich 1297 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 28. Juli 1310 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Forfar, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Grey è nato il il 18 agosto 1266 nel Heaton, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Robert de Grey, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Valoines, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Thomas Grey circa 1280. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1297. Morì il 28 luglio 1310, nel Forfar, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Greyが1266年8月18日にイギリスノースウンバーランドヒートンで生まれた時，父Robert de Greyは20歳，母Joan de Valoinesは18歳であった。約1280年にMrs Thomas Greyと結婚した。彼は1297年に兵役登録をした。彼は1310年7月28日にイギリススコットランドアンガスフォーファルで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Grey(이)가 1266년 8월 18일 영국 노르스벌랜드 히턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Grey(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Valoines(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1280년 Mrs Thomas Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1297년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1310년 7월 28일 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 포파르에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.18 Aug 1266–28 Jul 1310: 18 de agosto de 1266–28 de julho de 1310
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Grey nasceu em 18 de agosto de 1266, em Heaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Grey, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Valoines, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Thomas Grey aproximadamente 1280. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1297. Ele faleceu em 28 de julho de 1310, em Forfar, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Grey родился 18 августа 1266 г. в местности хитон, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Grey было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Valoines, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Thomas Grey около 1280 г. В 1297 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 28 июля 1310 г. в местности форфар, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет.

es.18 Aug 1266–28 Jul 1310: 18 de agosto de 1266–28 de julio de 1310
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Grey nació el 18 de agosto de 1266, en Heaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Grey, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Joan de Valoines, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Mrs Thomas Grey aproximadamente 1280. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1297. Murió el 28 de julio de 1310, en Forfar, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años.
